description: The Shinwa-kai is a yakuza group based in Takamatsu, Kagawa, Japan, with an estimated 30 active members. It was renamed from the Takamatsu Shinwa-kai in 1971 and registered as a designated yakuza group in December 1992. It is the only designated yakuza group based in the Shikoku region and has been a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai since 1996.
